summary: Iteration 52 - Testing new collaboration features: Share Dialog, Comments Panel, Collab Toggle, and SharedView page. ALL FEATURES PASS - Backend 11/11 API tests passed, Frontend all critical tests passed.

features_tested.SHARE DIALOG - Share items list: PASS - Found 5 share items with data-testid='share-item-*'
features_tested.COMMENTS PANEL - Comment display: PASS - Comments displayed including 'Test comment from iteration 52'
features_tested.COLLAB TOGGLE - Enable/disable: PASS - Toggle changes class to include ring-green-500 when enabled
features_tested.SHARED VIEW - Document content: PASS - Shows document elements (text, highlighted word)
features_tested.BACKEND API - POST /api/documents/{doc_i: PASS - Creates share link with view/edit permission
features_tested.BACKEND API - GET /api/documents/{doc_id: PASS - Returns list of active share links
features_tested.BACKEND API - DELETE /api/share/{share_i: PASS - Revokes share link (404 after revoke)
features_tested.BACKEND API - GET /api/shared/{share_id}: PASS - Returns document with permission info

critical_code_review_comments: ShareDialog.js correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CommentsPanel.js implements full comment lifecycle (add, reply, resolve, delete)
SharedView.js properly renders document in read-only mode for guests
WebSocket collaboration endpoint at /api/ws/collab/{doc_id} correctly handles auth message
Share API correctly generates unique share_id with format share_{uuid}
Comment API correctly generates unique comment_id with format cmt_{uuid}

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All share, comments, collab features working

seed_data_creation: Created multiple share links (view/edit), comments with replies via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified all new collaboration features: (1) Share Dialog works with data-testid selectors, creates links with view/edit permissions, copy/revoke buttons functional, (2) Comments Panel works with add comment, reply visible, (3) Collab Toggle enables WebSocket collaboration mode with green ring indicator, (4) SharedView at /shared/{share_id} renders documents for guests. The test share_id share_aa7ddfa2c22b has 'edit' permission. Multiple test comments created by pytest exist in doc_83a776d30cd3.
